'''Z-N0''' was a [[J9 worker drone/Legends|J9 worker drone]] assigned to the [[Jedi/Legends|Jedi]] investigator [[Ambaln]] by the [[Jedi Council/Legends|Jedi Council]]. When Ambaln turned to the [[Dark side of the Force/Legends|dark side]], Z-N0 remained loyal to the Jedi Council. Although Ambaln's behavior made Z-N0 suspicious, Z-N0 did not realize Ambaln had betrayed the Council. Ambaln duped Z-N0 into leading a team sent by the Council into a trap on [[Lobaoc]], during which Z-N0 fell into the marsh. The Jedi later retrieved Z-N0 from the marsh, and Z-N0 was assigned by the Jedi High Council to help track down Ambaln.
